channel.title: +2025 Op sindUr on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +2025 Op sindUr on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Indus water
item.description:
Source: TW

Goal

The goal is not to withold 80%. That is not possible. The goal is to build new reservoirs, canal links, irrigation projects, etc. so that it can withhold an additional 15-20%.
Obviously all water flowing into Pakistan cannot simply be turned off immediately, but it’s fair for India to build reservoirs, canals, pumping systems, and recharge infrastructure to divert much of the water.

Regarding India’s suspension of the Indus Water Treaty following Pahalgam terrorist attack, I used to think it was solely punitive but my current view is that it is justified.

item.title: Pm speech 05 12
item.description:
English rendering of PM’s address to the Nation Posted On: 12 MAY 2025 8:27PM by PIB Delhi
My dear countrymen, Namaskar!

In the past days, we all have witnessed both the strength and patience of our country. First of all, on behalf of the people of India, I salute the valiant forces of India, the armed forces, our intelligence agencies, and our scientists. Our brave soldiers displayed immense courage to achieve the objectives of Operation Sindoor. I pay tribute to their bravery, courage and valour. I dedicate this valour to every mother, every sister and every daughter of the country.
